title: Elytra Trail
description: Adds a trail to your elytra
body:
This mods adds a simple trail when using a elytra.\
You can toggle the visibility of all trails using the `/trigger toggle_elytra_trails` command.
![Trail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CCD9l2IH/images/7e1127fa452fe02389d06555691b4da35b626263.png)
